title: 30th Anniversary short written by Anno at celebration event in Japan
display_title: 30th Anniversary short written by Anno at celebration event in Japan
wikitext:
[]: 30th Anniversary short written by Anno at celebration event in Japan             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Dec 18, 2025 4:13 am tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: 30th Anniversary short written by Anno at celebration event in Japan             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Thu Dec 18, 2025 5:18 am I wonder what will this 13 minute short film cover, probably another short about one of the WILLE crew?

[]: Re: 30th Anniversary short written by Anno at celebration event in Japan             Quote Post by Joseki » Thu Dec 18, 2025 7:10 am As usual with Evangelion promotional short, I expect absolutely nothing of value.

[]: Re: 30th Anniversary short written by Anno at celebration event in Japan             Quote Post by Konja7 » Thu Dec 18, 2025 9:17 am Joseki wrote: As usual with Evangelion promotional short, I expect absolutely nothing of value.

[]: Re: 30th Anniversary short written by Anno at celebration event in Japan             Quote Post by Weird_ocean » Thu Dec 18, 2025 10:05 am Since I watched Rebuilds I got completely disillusioned with Anno and Khara and every mention of any new projects or plans for EVA just gives me overwhelming feeling of anxiety. "Here we go again with some low effort cash grab." I don't know. I don't expect anything good anymore from them. Considering it is for the EVA 30+ events (I think) I don't really expect it being anything serious, because it will be screened only for those who bought a special ticket or something. And those tickets are already sold out I think. I heard the cost around $200. So it really looks like just another promotional material for the rescreening of Rebuilds movies and 30+ events. I don't know, I have 0 excitement or hope about it.

[]: Re: 30th Anniversary short written by Anno at celebration event in Japan             Quote Post by Jinroh » Thu Dec 18, 2025 10:11 am The previous short was nice, but I don't expect anything interesting from a paid event. It probably won't be a teaser either for some kind of inbetween movie, and that's the only thing I'm interested in.

[]: Re: 30th Anniversary short written by Anno at celebration event in Japan             Quote Post by Superblunt » Thu Dec 18, 2025 10:43 am I got excited when I misread "Evangelion 3.0+", thinking it would be a 3.0 prequel that covers the 14 year gap. I welcome anything new from Eva, though. I loved -46h.

[]: Re: 30th Anniversary short written by Anno at celebration event in Japan             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Thu Dec 18, 2025 10:58 am Giji Shinka wrote: I wonder what will this 13 minute short film cover, probably another short about one of the WILLE crew?

[]: Re: 30th Anniversary short written by Anno at celebration event in Japan             Quote Post by Jinroh » Thu Dec 18, 2025 12:19 pm A neat idea would be to make shorts like -46h about each Wunder crew member to show their little adventures and how they survived third impact and joined Wille. It could be a clever marketing campaign over a couple of months/years to hype up and gauge interest in a potential "2.5" movie. (One can always dream )

[]: Rebuild 30th Anniversary boxset             Quote Post by Jinroh » Thu Dec 18, 2025 3:46 pm 13 minutes of Shinji working at the office and wasting time at the coffee machine

[]: Re: 30th Anniversary short written by Anno at celebration event in Japan             Quote Post by DTGee » Thu Dec 18, 2025 3:48 pm I wonder what the release plan for this after the festival is. Or do they even plan on showing this outside the festival at all? Unlike 3.0 -46h, there's no blu-ray set coming soon to put it on.

[]: Re: 30th Anniversary short written by Anno at celebration event in Japan             Quote Post by dzzthink » Thu Dec 18, 2025 6:11 pm Wow big news but is it going to be worth it?

[]: Re: 30th Anniversary short written by Anno at celebration event in Japan             Quote Post by writer » Thu Dec 18, 2025 6:22 pm Most interesting about the title is the ; which could suggest this will only be part of whatever story they're introducing. My dream is that, in the newly created world after Thrice there are no Eva's or Angels. Instead, there are KAIJU! And everyone works together at Monarch! Very excited about this, regardless.

[]: Re: 30th Anniversary short written by Anno at celebration event in Japan             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Dec 20, 2025 9:46 am Joseki wrote: As usual with Evangelion promotional short, I expect absolutely nothing of value.

[]: Re: 30th Anniversary short written by Anno at celebration event in Japan             Quote Post by Weird_ocean » Sat Dec 20, 2025 12:03 pm kuribo-04 wrote: The major difference is Anno wrote this. It's also probably not plot based, but more of a celebration of the series.

[]: Re: 30th Anniversary short written by Anno at celebration event in Japan             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Dec 20, 2025 4:37 pm Weird_ocean wrote: Were going a bit off topic here, but what is ambitious about it? Because it is a long movie? And half of it is filled with CG battle scenes that has nothing to do with the story? Or characters that sit and do nothing for the majority of the movie, and then they snap out of it and all forgive each other for no reason?

[]: Re: 30th Anniversary short written by Anno at celebration event in Japan             Quote Post by DTGee » Sat Dec 20, 2025 9:33 pm writer wrote: Most interesting about the title is the ; which could suggest this will only be part of whatever story they're introducing.

[]: Re: 30th Anniversary short written by Anno at celebration event in Japan             Quote Post by Joseki » Sun Dec 21, 2025 5:57 am kuribo-04 wrote: The major difference is Anno wrote this. It's also probably not plot based, but more of a celebration of the series.

[]: Re: 30th Anniversary short written by Anno at celebration event in Japan             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Sun Dec 21, 2025 8:03 am Honestly I can't imagine holding some of these opinions on Anno's writing I'm seeing and being an active member of an Evangelion fan forum. I mean you guys do you I guess but its very alien to me. As far as the short itself goes I'm looking forward to it, whether its just some meta thing or more Rebuild worldbuilding or whatever else.

[]: Re: 30th Anniversary short written by Anno at celebration event in Japan             Quote Post by Joseki » Sun Dec 21, 2025 10:06 am The Killer of Heroes wrote: Honestly I can't imagine holding some of these opinions on Anno's writing I'm seeing and being an active member of an Evangelion fan forum. I mean you guys do you I guess but its very alien to me. As far as the short itself goes I'm looking forward to it, whether its just some meta thing or more Rebuild worldbuilding or whatever else.
